The Mission

This Is Bigger
Than Music

For years, James & Olevia have ministered through worship, church, community service, education, and outreach. Now comes the release of Ready For You — a project born from prayer, testimony, and real-life journeys with God.

As we prepare for this Album Release Experience, we are inviting a limited number of partners to help us expand the reach of this message through music, media, and ministry.

Your support helps us

  • Expand radio promotion
  • Reach new listeners nationwide
  • Continue ministry outreach
  • Fund ongoing music projects
  • Impact future generations

About The Artists

James &
Olevia

James & Olevia are a brother-sister Gospel duo committed to ministry through music, worship, and community impact. Together they blend authentic worship, powerful storytelling, and generational influence to create music that points people toward hope and purpose.

"Anchored in grace. Strengthened by the Blood. Surrendered to the Spirit. Positioned for God to move."

Their newest project, Ready For You, represents a declaration of faith — a musical testimony forged through real seasons of trust, surrender, and breakthrough.
